Title: Cannot access the HR portal
Description: Several employees reported being unable to log into the HR portal since this morning. The page loads but the login button does not respond after entering credentials.

Title: Printer on 3rd floor not responding
Description: The shared printer in the 3rd floor office is offline. Restarting it did not help. Print jobs are stuck in the queue.

Title: Email client crashing on startup
Description: Outlook crashes immediately after the splash screen on two workstations in the finance department. Reinstalling did not resolve the issue.

Title: Request for additional monitor
Description: Employee from the marketing team is requesting a second monitor for their workstation to improve productivity.

Title: VPN disconnects randomly during calls
Description: Multiple remote employees are experiencing VPN drops during video calls. The issue occurs roughly every 30 minutes and requires a manual reconnect.

Title: Software license expired for design tool
Description: The Figma license for the design team expired yesterday. Team members cannot access their projects until the license is renewed.

Title: Keyboard keys sticking on reception desk PC
Shared drive folder permissions incorrect
Description: The marketing team cannot write to the shared drive folder they previously had access to. It appears permissions were reset after the recent server maintenance.

Title: New employee onboarding — account setup needed
Description: A new developer is starting on Monday and needs accounts created for GitHub, Jira, Slack, and internal systems. Please provision access before end of Friday.
